title: Add analytics runtime store, facts, metrics, monitors and signals
requirements: Store bulk analytics facts and snapshots in data/analytics/ as Parquet-compatible datasets.
Use Django DB for control-plane models: runs, signals, diagnostics, cases and audit.
Add metrics for department reports and regulator requests as the first universal MVP examples.
Create monitor evaluation and signal generation from AnalyticsFactDelta.
Write SampleManifest for each scoped analysis run.
